info.name: 000 E2E Plate Selection
info.description: E2E Plate Selection: minimal run to test each API. After DB rebuild, seed is minimal (super_admin, Vianda Enterprises, Vianda Customers, Global market only). Order: (1) Login Super Admin, (2) Create 1 credit currency + 1 local market, List Markets, 1 plan, (3) Supplier Setup (no bank account — payout is Stripe-only via pipeline), (4) Supplier Menu Setup, (5) Client Setup (includes Register plate selection, Post QR Code Scan — scan creates restaurant balance, Get enriched plate pickups, Complete order, Create plate review, List my reviews), (6) Restaurant Staff Operations (Get Daily Orders only), (7) Login Super Admin, Run settlement pipeline (Issue bills), Get Bills, Get institution bill by ID. Supplier payment uses the atomic pipeline (settlement → bill → payout); restaurant balance comes from Post QR Code Scan. Plate reviews: customer completes pickup then submits Stars (1-5) and Portion Size (1-3). Variables: adminUsername=superadmin, adminPassword=SuperAdmin1!.

item.description: Operations for restaurant staff to view daily orders. Do NOT add Generate Daily Bills here: that legacy API resets all restaurant balances to zero before creating bills, so running it before Run settlement pipeline would leave no balance and cause NO_BILLS_CREATED. The E2E flow uses Run settlement pipeline (Issue bills) instead.
